name: Athens Community Center
description: Athens Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Athens, OH. There are 8 wood and hard courts. 4 are outdoors and 4 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Christ Community Wesleyan Church
description: Come play pickleball at Christ Community Wesleyan Church in Albany, OH! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are private.

name: Ohio University Golf & Tennis Center - Indoor Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Ohio University Golf & Tennis Center - Indoor Courts in Athens, OH! There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved.
